name: another-brain
description: Answer Machine: local-first browser-side answers for efishother.com.

scripts.check: npm run check:release && npm run check:launch-policy && npm run check:seo && npm run check:identity-pack && npm run check:help-onboarding && npm run check:fallback-overuse && npm run check:dataset-splits && npm run check:frontend-latency && npm run check:voice-verifier && npm run check:output-sanitizer && npm run check:dialog-sanity && npm run check:gate-effectiveness && npm run check:r9-reasoning-gate && npm run check:culture-awareness && npm run check:context-gate && npm run check:blind-casepacks && python3 scripts/validate_distillation.py && python3 scripts/eval_tiny_router.py && python3 scripts/eval_dialog_persona.py && python3 scripts/validate_context_stress_cases.py && python3 scripts/validate_clone_logic_ethics.py && node scripts/eval_casepacks_node.mjs --min-score 0.88 --out artifacts/training_os/casepack_eval_report.json && node scripts/run_model_gate_node.mjs --out artifacts/training_os/model_inference_report.json
